Manage Git-based source control integration for apps, enabling version control and CI/CD workflows.

The Retool Management API enables administrators to programmatically manage users, groups, permissions, apps, resources, workflows, folders, spaces, and source control integrations within a Retool organization. Authenticated via Bearer token generated in workspace settings. The API also supports SCIM 2.0 for enterprise identity provider provisioning via Okta and Azure AD.

 Name: Retool Support
